entry.content: i am facing the same issue can anyone share your inputs to resolve the issue

entry.title: Re: For the intercompany transactions, is it possible to...
entry.content: Usually for intercompany I use IDOC and no API.

entry.title: Re: accounts.serach filtering
entry.content: “Thanks for clarifying, SAPSupport. Just to confirm—does restricting the returned parameters also prevent data from being accessible via the API key, or does it only limit what’s shown in the response? Curious about securing the data at the API key level.”

entry.title: Re: Validating the Valuation Class in Material Master MM01
entry.content: That specifies valuation classes per material type, but not per plant.

entry.title: Re: Birthday and Anniversary alerts to the employees in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hey all,

5 Years ago i appreciate but if anyone has the below issue:

I have this approach and able to create MDF object using IC but Alert is not triggering. Rule is correct as I am following this blog.
I am getting below trace :
Call function 'triggerMDFAlertEvent' with parameters [BirthdayAnniversary_AK (BirthdayAnniversary_AK), Wed Dec 11 00:00:00 CET 2019, BirthdayAnniversary (BirthdayAnniversary), Mark Taylor (100239), AlertAk (AlertAK)]. Result: 'null'. Duration: 1635 microseconds.

It's because you've not made the rule to update the current year birthday field an onSave rule. I made the same mistake.

entry.title: Re: Local Mocking of External Service not working
entry.content: The issue is resolved when rebuilding the local sqlite database via "cds deploy --to sqlite --with-mocks". This builds the csv data into the local sqlite file including the csvs located in srv/external/data and resolves the error above.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2023 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @fabianorosa ,

You can't upgrade your existing Docker image.

You need to download the new image, then transport existing development objects using abapGit.

HTH,

Julie Plummer.

entry.title: Re: Issue with BDT Enhancement for custom fields in BUT000 in BP Tcode
entry.content: @AkbarHussain Yes, I was able to solve it. Instead of using cvi_bdt_adapter=>data_pai( i_table_name = table_name_but000 i_data_new = lt_but000[] i_validate = false ). in my above code. I used FM 'BUP_BUPA_BUT000_COLLECT' and it solved the problem

entry.title: Re: Issue with BDT Enhancement for custom fields in BUT00...
entry.content: This is resolved by using FM BUP_BUPA_BUT000_COLLECT in the above code instead of PAI.

entry.title: Re: Admin Center - Manage Organization, Pay, and Job Structures not available
entry.content: I have double checked provisioning and instance all permission are given, still issue not resolved

entry.title: SGEN issues (objects Generation Erros/Syntax Errors)
entry.content:
SGEN issue (objects Generation Erros/Syntax Errors) after upgrade from SAP ECC6 EHP4 (Netweaver 7.01, Kernel 7.22-PL 500) to EHP7 (Netweaver 7.04, Kernel 7.53-PL 1400) through SUM. (100% complete)

When run SGEN (All components) after the successful completion of SUM upgrade process, 

SGEN report shows a No. of generation errors (1541) in SGEN report. After Re-run SGEN, the Number is reduced and lastly no generation error (Unexpected behavior) but it always shows syntax errors (45). 

All SPAU/SPDD modifications are already adjusted and confirmed.

Detailed screenshots attached.

Please share any solution to fix this issue!

Regards.

entry.title: Re: <ReqdExctnDt> has to pick Today + 1 day in payment file
entry.content:
Hello @Kavitha_141

Thanks for your message and details. The <ReqdExctnDt> tag in the payment file is based on the Value Date entered during the payment run in S4 Public cloud.

Settings in SSCUI 101045 or the “Days” field in the house bank only affect cash position planning, not the execution date in the file.

To get today + 1, please manually set the Value Date to the next day when starting the payment run


Here are some useful official SAP references

1.SAP Help – Manage Automatic Payments  Covers how the payment run parameters (including Value Date) influence payment processing and file generation. 

2. SAP KBA 2954462 – ReqdExctnDt Value in Payment File (SAP login required)
Explains how <ReqdExctnDt> in payment files is typically taken from Value Date and confirms this behaviour for standard SAP-delivered payment formats

Let me know if you need further support

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: No value for Ledger or Business transaction type or Fiscal year or Period
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 
I have this error when performing a production process at the point of goods issue. 

Message no. FINS_BTTYPE_CHECKS003

 

System Response

The system cannot decide whether the posting period is open or not
because Business transaction type, Ledger,  Fiscal year or the period
were not provided or could not be determined according to the input data
of method CHECK_OBJECT_LIST of class CL_FINS_COMPANY_CHECKS

entry.title: Error: "Failed to map sales admin for sales contract. Check your BRF+ config." in Sales Contract Cre
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I’m encountering the following error during a sales contract creation process:

Error Message:
Failed to map sales admin for sales contract. Check your BRF+ config.

System: SAP S/4HANA (Cloud or On-Premise 
Process: Sales Contract Creation via App name: Create Deals 

❓My Question:

  • Where exactly in BRF+ should I configure the mapping for Sales Admin?

  • Is there a standard application or decision table I should use or activate?

  • Any prerequisites or common issues that could lead to this error?

Appreciate any guidance, screenshots, or SAP Note references. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Scrollbars in Grouptree are not working in SP38
entry.content: R&D got back to me, he could duplicate the issue and expects a fix in the next patch... thanks for reporting it.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 BY-PRODUCT
entry.content: The quantity of the by-product is declared negatively in the bill of materials, meaning that the by-product is indicated at the production input. Regarding the cost of the product, as I already explained, I want the production cost minus the cost of the by-product.

entry.title: Re: Open Past Period
entry.content: You should have uploaded the data before closing May. Now you need to upload it either in June or July. What is the data that you need to upload?

entry.title: Re: Validating the Valuation Class in Material Master MM01
entry.content: Yes I noticed that it is per plant in which case, it can be acheived via GGB0 by creating a new validation rule

entry.title: Re: New SDK behavior with Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 (Professional)
entry.content: We have the mentioned issues and a strange issue because we can't reproduce when it occurs. It happens sometimes when we try to open a solution after the login:

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 - Mobile App Feature - Custom MDF Object
entry.content:
Custom card feature is not supported in mobile app. Block Leave is an custom object and as per the latest release it works and accessible only in Web. 
 
SAP KBA:- Unsupported Features in Latest People Profile | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Bring 'Done' SFCs back to work
entry.content: @RomanIgnacioGonzalezDiMiele thanks! These methods will not work for Scrapped SFCs, as scrap is irreversible, and I´m not aware of any plans to change that. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: New SDK behavior with Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 (P...
entry.content:
We also have the mentioned issues and a strange issue because we can't reproduce when it occurs. It happens sometimes when we try to open a solution after the login: 

It happend for me and other colleagues. When the error occurred last week, I restarted the visual studio and it worked again. That didn't help the last time, I had to restart the whole laptop and thereafter it worked again.

The path in the screenshot only exists until the folder "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Professional\Common7\IDE" the other parts of the path seems to be similar like the project folder paths. But my location settings are different:

entry.title: Re: All leaf elements must be used as part of the associa...
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

thank you very much!

The only thing, that was missing, is the compounded key in the MD View, which I have associated with 2_GV_CS_ITEM_HIERWITHDIRECTORY_02. The error message was misleading..

“The flattening” was already correct. I do it in a little bit different way, I use calculated columns -> like described in the mentioned link

Hierarchien aus SAP BW in Datasphere abbilden: So geht's

It is need to be done for each InfoObject from the IOBJNM column of the BW hierarchy table (/BI0/H*, in my case /BI0/HCS_ITEM).

In normal case these are 0HIER_NODE and the InfoObject itself.

KNOTEN: case when IOBJNM = '0HIER_NODE' then NODENAME else null end

UNTERPOSITION: case when IOBJNM = '0CS_ITEM' then NODENAME else null end

CS_CHAR, CS_ITEM and NODE_WO_COMPND (WO_COMPND = without compounding) are created with "String" functions

CS_ITEM: RIGHT("UNTERPOSITION", 10) CS_CHART: LEFT(NODENAME, 2)

NODE_WO_COMPND: RIGHT("KNOTEN", (LENGTH("KNOTEN") - 2))

P.S. Kudo is done, solution is accepted!

Best regards

Nadine

entry.title: Re: Add System Information on Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Yes. Available for SAP S/4HANA since release 2021. Use the Launchpad Configuration Parameters in transaction /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF to set the System Information bar on. All the parameters start with SYS_INFO_...

Very nice! Works a treat! 

Also see the guide...

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/a7b390faab1140c087b8926571e942b7/eae3cc31b1d34d139d153067fcecd975.html?

entry.title: Re: Como foi o primeiro SAP Meetup no Rio de Janeiro
entry.content: Muito bom ver a comunidade reunida!

entry.title: FIORI Url as Oauth2 through OKTA IDP
entry.content:
I am reaching out to seek assistance regarding the configuration of the Fiori URL as OAuth2. I have successfully created a profile through Tcode OA2C_CONFIG and have integrated OKTA as the Identity Provider (IDP). Additionally, I can obtain an Access token via Tcode OA2C_GRANT, and the flow is properly directing to the Fiori URL.

However, I am encountering an issue with the Fiori link that appears following the redirection. When I open the URL in a new private browser session, it initially directs me to the OKTA login details, which is expected. Yet, after redirecting to the Fiori URL, it prompts for SAP credentials. Ideally, the authentication should solely occur via the OKTA token without requiring any SAP credentials.

I would like to bring to your attention that I have already set up the email in the user alias through SU01, which I am using in OKTA.

Additionally, I have experimented with different logon methods for Fiori through SICF. When I selected Basic authentication, it still requests SAP credentials, and for other logon methods, I am receiving an unauthorized error.

Could you please provide guidance or support on resolving this issue? I appreciate your assistance in advance.

entry.title: Re: Common issues in SAP Joule Activation in SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Samir_Rai @Ger ,

I am getting the following error while running 8.3 jobs.

Can you help me?

entry.title: S/4 Hana Extensibility Service Instance
entry.content:
I have an application on SAP BTP. The application has few service bindings. For example : application-x has eleven bindings. Ten of them are of type s4-hana-cloud and one of them is xsuaa. I do understand that why we have binded xsuaa but I don't understand the use case of s4-hana-cloud bindings. 

Why do we need instance of s4-hana-cloud ? Also, I want to learn side by side extension development. Is there a good tutorial that outlines step by step guide? I want to use Cloud SDK for typescript code generation and then call some API from SAP Business Acclerator Hub. I understand few things. For example : Downloading edmx, then use cloud SDK to generate code and use that code on my service, creating destination. But I don't know how to put all these together. 

Help me with this. Thanks. Any paid course or resource is also highly appreciated. If you have question , then don't hesitate to ask.

entry.title: Re: RFQ table..
entry.content: Still the field KTMNG was 0 after the RFQ Published

entry.title: EWM - QM Integration Warehouse defect to QM Notification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I’m currently working on implementing a scenario in SAP QM where a warehouse defect is linked to a quality notification. While the defect is successfully getting linked to the notification, the related data such as material and quantity is not being updated in the notification.

As I’m relatively new to QM, I would appreciate any guidance or suggestions on what additional configuration might be required to ensure that the defect data transfers correctly.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide to Setting Up Joule with SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Kavya, 

Lot happening on AI Joule!

 Is there any Step by step guide to set up the system in our tenant on the below benefits . 

I see a lot of benefits mentioned below ( I got below info from SAP community )

1. Joule helps in providing feedback - P&G module
2. Requesting information - EC module
3. Changing personal information - EC module
4. Promoting employees - P&G module
5. helps to create Job descriptions and interview questions , identify the most qualified candidates and faster improved decisions
6. Schedule 1:1 meetings

Would wait for your response

regards

Lokesh

entry.title: Surfing the GOSI Final Wave: Riding the Peak with Top FAQs Answered
entry.content:
The tide has come in — the Saudi GOSI legal change is no longer upcoming legislation; it’s the new operational reality. As we ride the final peak of this change, many customers are paddling through implementation questions, system configurations, and compliance uncertainties.

In response, we’ve gathered the most frequently asked questions from the field — and we’re ready to answer them.

Q1: How the New Social Insurance issued in 1445 H will impact each SI Group?

  • SA Group:
    • Assigned to employees at or above age 50 Hijri (DOB ≤ December 30, 1975 / 26/12/1395 Hijri) or with ≥ 20 years of contribution as of July 3, 2024.
    • Follows the 1421 H policy.
    • Service and SANED stop at retirement age fixed at 60 Hijri (~58 years and 2 months Gregorian).
    • System will shift to Hijri-based age calculation. Follow updates here.
    • Contribution remains 9%.
  • SU Group:
    • Assigned to employees under age 50 Hijri (DOB > December 30, 1975) or with less than 20 years of contribution.
    • Follows the 1421 H policy.
    • Retirement age is between 58–65 Gregorian based on the table in the 1445 H policy.
    • Contribution remains 9%.
  • SN Group:
    • Assigned to employees whose contribution starts from July 3, 2024.
    • Follows the 1445 H policy.
    • Retirement age is fixed at 65 Gregorian.
    • Contribution increases by 0.5% annually every July from July 1, 2025, until it reaches 11% by July 2028.

Q2: What is the most effective strategy for assigning the correct Social Insurance (SI) Group to employees?

  • Hired Before 3/7/2024.
    1. Employees hired before July 3, 2024, should not be assigned to the SN group.
    2. Some of these employees may fall under the SU group, but the contribution percentage remains the same (9%), so no payroll calculation difference will occur.
    3. The main distinction lies in the retirement age associated with the SI Group. However, this does not impact the July payroll run or the immediate contribution behavior.     
    4. We recommend to Keep them under SA group for now, until we run July payroll.
  • Hired After 3/7/2024.
    1. Extract the list of employees who been hired after this date
    2. Check the employee’s date of birth — if the employee was born on or before December 30, 1975 (corresponding to 26/12/1395 Hijri), they should be assigned to the SA group.
    3. GOSI is not providing employers with any input to help classify an employee’s SI group. Only the employee can access the awareness portal to verify their category.
    4. For the remaining employees, please instruct them to visit the Awareness Portal to verify whether they belong to the SN or SU group.

Q3: How can I update the SI group in my system?

Since no automated method is available for this mass update, SAP cannot assume responsibility for the consequences of manual data changes. Make sure any update should be effective 1 July,2025.

  • Employee Central / EC Payroll: Refer to KBA: 3628572
  • SAP ERP HCM: Use LSMW or PDC.
  • HCM for S/4HANA: Refer to KBA 3426157

Q4: How can I stop the retirement age check temporarily until July payroll is completed?

  • By default, GOSI stops contributions the month retirement age is reached. Please make sure that you implement the Note: 3617952
  • Check the "No Age Check" box in IT3252 to continue contributions until termination.

Q5: What if an employee was assigned the wrong SI group and July payroll is closed?

If an employee was incorrectly assigned to the SA group instead of SN, and July payroll has already been closed, the GOSI invoice may reflect a different contribution amount (e.g., an extra 0.5%). To resolve this issue, follow the steps below to retroactively correct the master data. The system will automatically calculate and adjust the differences during the August payroll run.

  • Employee Central / Employee Central Payroll:
    • Navigate to Global Information > Insert New Record > Update the SI Group to SN, effective from July 1, 2025.
    •  After replication, the system will delimit Infotype 3252 and create a new record effective July 1, 2025.
  • On-Premise Payroll:
    • The administrator should delimit Infotype 3252 and manually create a new record effective from July 1, 2025.

Q6: Why can’t I find the configuration in my quality system after applying SAP Notes?

  • When you implement SAP notes only the golden client (000) gets updated because the GOSI customization tables are "C" type.
  • Please make sure that the below customization objects are configured in your target client as per your needs.
    • Define GOSI Contribution Groupings: V_T7SA22
    • Define GOSI Contribution Parameters: V_T7SA13
    •  Maintain Retirement Ages for Social Insurance Contribution: feature 24ERA
    • Assign Wage Types to SI Funds for Base Calculation: V_T7SA06

Q7: What are my options if I can’t upgrade my SAP system for GOSI-related notes?

  • SAP recommends upgrading to the latest release wherever possible to benefit from delivered standard functionality and ongoing legal compliance support.
  • However, if you are on an older SAP release and cannot apply the SAP Notes listed above, you must implement equivalent logic manually or via custom development to ensure compliance with the new GOSI regulations.
  • Please follow the below guidelines for each note:
    • 3494941: Follow Manual Instructions for New System.
    • 3511275: If not implemented, check “No Age Check” in IT3252 to continue contributions.
    • 3598324: Check awareness.gosi.gov.sa for manual SI assignment.
    • 3605632: SANED will still stop at termination. To stop SANED but continue annuity, assign to a custom SI group without SANED configured.

Closing Thoughts

As we close this chapter of the GOSI transition, we’re not just delivering answers — we’re inviting continued collaboration. Two bonus steps we’re taking:

  • We’ll be publishing this FAQ in the MENA SAP User Group space to open comments and encourage peer-to-peer learning.
  • A special Customer Support Day is being scheduled in the third week of July to provide instant, live support and gather direct feedback. We’ll soon publish it in the Localization Event Calendar on the SAP Community so you can easily register and save the date!

Let’s keep riding the wave — together.

entry.title: Sales order change header data Partners tab
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a requirement to restrict the user to change sold-to-party data in sales order header, partners tab, double click on the sold-to-party, the system allows to change general data.

Even though the change does not affect the customer master but still the business wants this to disabled in the sales order change. 

I have attached a screen shot. Please guide me if anyone has come across this requirement.

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: B2B Integration Factory Q4/2024 Release highlights
entry.content:
Hello @lauraquinterosa:
Thanks a lot for reaching out!
Reading the parameters is handled via the generic iFlows. Please check out the B2B Integration Packages in the Business Accelerator Hub.

Yes, you have the possibility to define your target message types, so you can also have 2 IDoc receivers with different IDoc types

entry.title: Source in Job info updating as Performance management when hire and new hire are created
entry.content:
As we are using business rule to auto Tigger of the PMGM forms when an new hire or new hire happens based on the job information  record due to this in job information it captures as source as Performance management so we are unbale to view the hire record and rehire 

Can some tell us how to disable the source performance management with out stopping the business rule

entry.title: Re: Validating the Valuation Class in Material Master MM01
entry.content: Will GGB0 validation work in material master maintenance?

entry.title: Re: Integrating Onboarding and Learning For New Hires Before Day-1
entry.content:
Hi There,

Can anyone help me understand why have we put User Status as D in the Filter of the Integration Center Job.

If the Onboarding Process is cancelled the Status changed to inactive_Externa_Suite and in the backed its d.

Its bit confusing why are we sending the cancelled candidate to LMS.

Thanks,

Parul

entry.title: Re: Say Hi to Joule in SAP SuccessFactors Mobile, Powered by SAP Build — Part 2: Architecture, Execu
entry.content:
Hi @Yogananda,

Did you try tapping on the image? It opens in an enlarged view? Does that help?

entry.title: Re: Validating the Valuation Class in Material Master MM01
entry.content:
Hello @javierm_9230 

OMSK configuration defines allowed valuation classes per material type, but not per plant.

To validate valuation classes you need to implement a custom logic with the MGA00001 user exit for MM01 and MM02 and/or the CMD_PRODUCT_VALIDATE BAdI for the Manage Product Master Fiori app.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Validating the Valuation Class in Material Master MM01
entry.content: Yes in GGB0, after defining the prerequisite for valuation class and a check for plant, it can be activated via ob28. Longtime back, I did this and have to revisit this

entry.title: SAP API PROXY principal propagation error 403
entry.content:
Greetings SAP community,

I have been trying to expose an ODATA service on our on-premsis ECC system through Integration Suite's API Proxy.

I configured all the nesscary steps between BTP and SCC, SCC and the back-end system so that the identity is forwarded to SCC and then to the back-end system by X.509.

I have confirmed that Principal Propagation works as i use it in a Destination Configuration with SAP Graph and it forwards the identity correctly, requests are executed sucessfully.

However when i try to send a request through API Proxy, i recieve an error 403. API Management isnt exactly clear on how the request should be sent to the proxy, whether it should contain a specific header or a token. I have tried to send the JWT recieved from the OAUTH server for an Integration Flow client in the Authorization Header, still getting the same 403 error.

The API provider created for the proxy uses Authentication type "Principal Propagation".

I would appreciate help in this matter.

entry.title: Espresso Sessions: Strategic Overview of SAP Customer Experience Solutions in Utilities
entry.content:
Join us for an insightful webcast tailored for professionals in the utilities sector. This session will explore the latest industry trends and how SAP’s Customer Experience (CX) solutions are transforming the way utility companies engage with their customers.

Discover how SAP is driving innovation by integrating seamless business processes with cutting-edge technologies and AI enhancing operational efficiency and elevating customer satisfaction.

 

Key Takeaways

  • A strategic overview of customer experience drivers and trends in the utilities industry
  • Insights into SAP’s latest solution portfolio and innovations
  • Introduction to SAP’s value tools specifically designed for the utilities sector

Speaker

Florian Frömberg,  Senior Industry Expert, Industry Business Unit Utilities at SAP

Date: Tuesday, 15 July 2025 at 16:00 - 16:30 CET
Register here

entry.title: Creating tile in public cloud S4HANA
entry.content: I deployed my custom fiori app to public cloud s4hana. Now it is not showing my app in IAM apps in public cloud DEV tenant. I need to create a tile in public cloud s4hana for my app. Also in eclipse, When I am doing right click on my IAM app created, I am not getting option to activate it as it is greyed out. Please help with the steps required here for creation of tile.

entry.title: Re: How to report an incident for ADT ?
entry.content:
Dear SAP & SAP customers,

are you aware, that the feature "Collect Support Information" downloads passwords stored in the Eclipse in clear text format?

 

 

A concerned SAP customer

#Cyber-Security #Need-to-know

entry.title: How can you check who created a transportation lane in SAP TM?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to check who created a transportation lane in SAP TM? Is there a transaction or table with the log "created by"?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Creating Mashup to Show SAP S/4HANA Addresses in SAP Service Cloud Version 2 for Utilities Add-o
entry.content:
Hi Syed,

You will have to save the HTML file on a server; one option would be to use BTP for this. When you save the file, you will get the complete URL. If you are just testing, I have also used GitHub to store your HTML file, here you will also be provided a complete URL.

Hope that answered your question.

Best Regards,

Steen

entry.title: Error attempting to create a Collection type table
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a Collection table in the "LOAD" database with the command below.

CREATE COLLECTION "LOAD"."JSONSL";

And I'm getting the following error.

SQL Error [3584] [HY000]: SAP DBTech JDBC: [3584]: distributed SQL error: Cannot access hdbdocstore, process either not started deliberately or not available

entry.title: Re: Make JobInfo Field Mandatory
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

It appears that it took the system a while to synchronize the change. Enabling the mandatory entry for the field in BCUI actually worked.

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Applying different recording dictionary to recording
entry.content:
On one of my projects, some of the dev team members did not activate the custom recording dictionary which was created, meaning they were using the SAP one. Is there a way of applying a different recording dictionary on an existing recording? I've actually tried with an AI tool and it's mentioning menu options which don't exist in SEN...

 

Thx

entry.title: Re: Validating the Valuation Class in Material Master MM01
entry.content:
OB28 is "validation of accounting documents" not material master data. Hence my question if GBB0 validation work with MM01, MM02 transactions.

I guess not - if they were, SAP would not have provided the dedicated user-exit to validate MM01, MM02 data.

entry.title: Re: No value for Ledger or Business transaction type or F...
entry.content:
Hi @OOJ ,

Please verify below config checks:-

1. Are you using custom Business transaction type (BTT) or standard one ? If custom, then verify if correctly assigned or or mapping missing.
2. Verify ledger or ledger group is missing or inconsistent.
3. Posting date entered during the goods issue falls within an open posting period for the relevant company code.

I hope this answer your question.

Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: SAP Signavio Product Release Webcast - July 2025
entry.content:
Join Us for the SAP Signavio July 2025 Release Update!

Get ready to transform your business with the new and powerful features in the July 2025 SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite release. In this webcast, we will unveil innovations that automate critical processes, enhance daily operations, and unlock deeper insights.

Release Highlights:

- Enhance efficiency with root cause analysis
- Democratize process mining and data analysis with AI
- Drive procurement excellence with value accelerators

Step into the future with us! Join us Tuesday, July 29, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. CEST / 10:00 a.m. EST as we reveal the latest innovations from our July 2025 market release.

Register now to reserve your spot!

entry.title: User ID Change
entry.content:
Hello,

Let us assume that a user has been offboarded and then rehired with different Job Information. The way it was done has altered the person's User ID and there is, presumably, no way to alter the set User ID manually in the profile. However, I need to revert it back to the original User ID. The only way I can think of is to purge an employee and reimport them with the required User ID. Is there a different, less invasive way to do that?

Kind regards,
A.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Country Activation in CBC
entry.content: SAP recommends activating 5 countries only for content activation, as activation bottlenecks could occur. You can activate the additional countries in a sequence without confirming the Org structure.

entry.title: HTML code in Manage Job Profiles
entry.content:
Hi,

In Admin Centre, Manage Profiles, is there a way we can we see HTML codes for different Job Profile templates we created?   We have it in Manage Offer Letter templates which is the "Show Source Code" but I can't see it anywhere in Job Profiles templates. 

Thank you!

Marie-Josée Lacroix

entry.title: Re: problem connecting process automation with build app
entry.content: Hi Jakub, thanks for your reply. The project is released, deployed and published. But I can't see it in the Buildapp library. I'm wondering if there is any configuration that I missed.

entry.title: Re: BPC SAP UI Landscape Configuration is missing
entry.content:
Hi @peter_vonscchubert49 ,

 

I am not expert on this topic, but EPM add-on is required. I checked with one of  my fellow associate. He told if add-on is missing then re-install MS Office with EPM option selected.

I hope this answer your question.

Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: How can you check who created a transportation lane i...
entry.content:
Hello @MarcosF 

Not, unless you have activated transportation lane change documents - SPRO:

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Sales order change header data Partners tab
entry.content: Ask your ABAPers to look at the call to FM 'SD_PARTNER_ADDRESS_DIALOG' from the VA01/VA02 main program. The display-only flag is managed in a global variable, so it could easily be set for every partner, but as you only require it for the sold-to type, it should be dynamic in the loop at table control.

entry.title: Re: Overwrite dimension filters in SAC Excel Add-in table...
entry.content:
@Chanti 

I think this is currently not possible. You are trying something similar to EPMDimensionOverride from BPC.

SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER only supports member or list of members from a Excel range. The challenge is you need to first get a list of products filtered by Plant attribute. e.g. Plant="X". Currently there are no formulas which return you a list of dimension members filtered by a property value.

You could try a workaround using 2 tables and some excel array formulas. Create a table with products and plant category shown. Then create a array formula filtering this row range of Table 2 using FILTER function and then pass this formula range in your SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Common issues in SAP Joule Activation in SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @dogukanpadel 
It looks like your RFC destination or maybe on the CC is the issue. Is it responsible with Check internal host.

entry.title: Tax details are deleted automatically in BP identification Tab when extended vendor to new company
entry.content:
Hi All,

Tax details are deleted automatically in BP, General data, identification Tab when the vendor extended to new company code in BP in ECC

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: problem connecting process automation with build app
entry.content: Can you show the value of "endpoints" and "html5-apps-repo"? Both should contain some data in json format. You mentioned that "html5-apps-repo" is blank, what would be incorrect. Can you check it, please?

entry.title: Re: Handler for Button not called in adaptation
entry.content:
Probably you are missing the . before the extension,  MainCntrlExt is also missed

 

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core='sap.ui.core' xmlns='sap.m'>
    <Button id='LorCapBtn' text="LorCap" press='.extension.customer.create.notif.variant.MainCntrlExt.onLorCapPress'/> 
</core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: Re: problem connecting process automation with build app
entry.content: Hi Jakub, I don't have values for 'endpoints' and 'html5-apps-repo'. Can you let me know what type of value they should be?

entry.title: Re: How can you check who created a transportation lane i...
entry.content: Thanks anyway, Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Unlocking the Power of SAP BW/4HANA Metadata in the SAP Datasphere catalog in BDC
entry.content:
A Strategic Catalyst for AI, Advanced Analytics, and SAP BW Modernization

As enterprises accelerate their transformation into intelligent, AI-driven organizations, the value of data is undisputed. But the true differentiator lies in data that is trusted, contextualized, and explainable. In SAP environments, much of this mission-critical data lives within SAP BW/4HANA. Yet simply accessing the data isn’t enough — it’s the metadata that brings meaning and confidence to analytics.

With the SAP Datasphere Catalog, in Business Data Cloud (BDC), organizations can now unlock the full potential of newly delivered [https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/sap-datasphere-catalog-harvesting-from-sap-bw-4hana/ba-p/14131825

 SAP BW/4HANA metadata — enabling advanced analytics, machine learning, and informed decision-making at scale.

Why BW/4HANA Metadata Matters

SAP BW/4HANA is more than just a data warehouse. It is a system enriched with decades of embedded business logic and semantics — from InfoObjects to complex hierarchies.

This metadata encodes essential context: relationships, aggregation rules, dependencies, fiscal calendars, and business logic. Without this semantic layer, users accessing BW objects or BDC data products risk overlooking key elements like time dependencies or KPI definitions — often requiring them to examine raw data just to understand what an object means.

The risk? Misinterpretation, inaccurate insights, and lost trust in analytics.

How SAP Datasphere Catalog Adds Value

The SAP Datasphere Catalog transforms BW/4HANA metadata from static documentation into living, discoverable knowledge, delivering:

  • Semantic Discovery: Search and understand data using business-friendly terminology, not technical object names.
  • Lineage and Impact Analysis: Visualize how metrics like Net Sales are derived across multiple BW layers.
  • Contextual Insights: Access metadata such as units of measure, aggregation types, fiscal periods, and hierarchies.
  • AI-Ready Data Products: The BDC Data Product Generator uses this metadata to produce explainable, trusted data products for AI/ML pipelines — including those built in SAP Datasphere or external platforms like SAP Databricks.
  • Analytics Scenarios: Easily build analytics use cases that answer business-critical questions with precision and transparency.
  • Increased Trust: Analysts and data scientists gain visibility into how features and KPIs are constructed, enhancing model explainability and decision confidence.

Empowering Every Analytics Persona

Bringing BW/4HANA metadata into the SAP Datasphere Catalog empowers diverse users across the enterprise:

  • Data Scientists — to understand seasonality, customer-centric attributes, and temporal patterns.
  • Analytics Engineers — to trace the logic behind calculated measures and KPIs.
  • Business Users — to interpret hierarchies like Product Group or Sales Region for accurate reporting and forecasting.

Availability alone isn’t enough — metadata provides the understanding that makes data actionable.

Metadata: A Strategic Asset for the AI Era

As enterprises modernize SAP BW with SAP Datasphere and private cloud editions of BW/4HANA, metadata becomes a strategic bridge between legacy systems and future-ready platforms.

Integrating BW/4HANA metadata into the catalog ensures enterprise data is:

  • Understandable
  • Governed
  • AI-Ready

More importantly, it allows thousands of existing SAP BW customers to bring forward their rich business context into the SAP Business Data Cloud — powering next-generation analytics and AI use cases.

Conclusion: Invest in Metadata, Unlock Intelligent Insights

In a world where AI and ML are redefining competitive advantage, metadata is foundational. By exposing the deep semantics of SAP BW/4HANA through the SAP Datasphere Catalog in Business Data Cloud, organizations can ensure that their data is:

  • Trusted
  • Explainable
  • Ready for Action

The journey toward intelligent, AI-powered analytics begins with metadata. And the time to unlock it is now.

entry.title: Re: problem connecting process automation with build app
entry.content:
From your service key for the SBPA service.

For example, endpoint is:

{"api":"https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-eu-prod.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com"}

But I tried to modify mine without those values or with some of your values, and I still saw the processes.

Maybe also show a screenshot of your destination. Also, I am assuming the issue you do not see any processes, and not specific to this one you published?

Also, are you able to see actions?

Also, can you show a screenshot of the actual deployed process (I mean the design time)?

entry.title: Re: Issue with Posting Supplier Invoice in MIRO – Line It...
entry.content:
Hello Vignesh,

This is one of the critical burning issue with SAP. If you look at ACDOCA table structure you can enter line items more than 999, i guess upto 10000. However, the limitation in BSEG is upto 999, therefore, you have to stick to 999. The only options are workaround.

1. Break you invoice into smaller lines less than 999. Make sure you count VAT tax lines, WHT lines (if any) and vendor lines in total 999 lines.

2. Post partial invoice using Invoice reference field like (InvoiceA_1 for first invoice, InvoiceA_2 for other part of first invoice)

3. Third option is write a wrapper program to balance the document into a contra GL account and use the same GL account in subsequent invoice till all lines get posted.

There many KBA and notes and SAP help docs on this.

2845836 - Maximum number of items in FI reached

I hope this answer your question.

Appreciate your feedback.
Thanks,
Divyesh

entry.title: Re: BPC SAP UI Landscape Configuration is missing
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your reply.

entry.title: Re: Tax details are deleted automatically in BP identific...
entry.content:
Have you already made a comparison for the users and the companies on :

  • Authorization
  • Field control settings
  • Copy contro settings

entry.title: Re: problem connecting process automation with build app
entry.content: Besides the destination is only an issue in runtime, not for discoverability.

entry.title: Re: Scenario Step Identifier in SAP Business One Integration Framework
entry.content: Which scenario are you trying to configure? it is related to SAP Customer Checkout? it is a standard scenario or an own scenario developed?

entry.title: Re: Installation Eclipse and configuration ADT tool
entry.content: hi

entry.title: Re: Issue with Posting Supplier Invoice in MIRO – Line It...
entry.content:
I would also mention those KBA: 

  • 1801529 - Error message F5727 "Maximum number of items in FI reached" when release MM document to accounting 
  • 3308049 - Error message F5 727 / F5727 overview / how-to scenarios
